title: astragalus leucocephalus
intro: Astragalus leucocephalus, also known as white milk vetch, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the legume family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its adaptogenic and immunomodulatory effects, which make it effective in reducing stress and enhancing the body's ability to fight off infections. The health benefits of Astragalus leucocephalus include improved immune function, reduced inflammation, and enhanced cardiovascular health. Astragalus leucocephalus can be prepared into herbal teas, extracts, or capsules, allowing for various forms of consumption to support overall well-being.
